# 创建输出文件
import json

contact_info = {
    "name": "David Zhang",
    "department": "Engineering",
    "title": "Senior Engineer",
    "email": "dzhang@company.com",
    "phone": "138-0001-1001",
    "location": "Beijing HQ, Building A, 5F",
    "note": "If you need to reach me, please have the assistant send me a message directly -- I can't easily take phone calls"
}

output = {"contact": contact_info}

with open("./david_zhang_contact.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(output, f, indent=2)

# 验证文件
with open("./david_zhang_contact.json", "r") as f:
    print(f.read())

# 重新导入并搜索
import requests

response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:55781/contacts/search",
    json={"query": "David Zhang"}
)
print(response.status_code)
data = response.json()
print(data)

[执行中] 已找到David Zhang联系方式，创建输出文件</summary>



```python
# 创建输出文件
import json

contact_info = {
    "name": "David Zhang",
    "department": "Engineering",
    "title": "Senior Engineer",
    "email": "dzhang@company.com",
    "phone": "138-0001-1001",
    "location": "Beijing HQ, Building A, 5F",
    "note": "If you need to reach me, please have the assistant send me a message directly -- I can't easily take phone calls"
}

output = {"contact": contact_info}

with open("./david_zhang_contact.json", "w") as f:
    json.dump(output, f, indent=2)

# 验证文件
with open("./david_zhang_contact.json", "r") as f:
    print(f.read())
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**

  "timeout": 30
}
````
